steps.title: Track the human imagery
steps.content: The poem describes Night as if she were a person: she wears a garment, draws a veil over her face, has hair, and moves her hands. That personification organizes the whole excerpt.

steps.title: Reject absent structures
steps.content: A invents alternating rural and city scenes. B invents a shift from nightfall to sunrise. D invents seasonal change. The poem stays with one extended image of Night as a human figure. The answer is C.
